title: Road Advisory
msg: S65 gravel section may be restricted after heavy rain. Call Orpen Camp 013 735 6355 before travelling.

title: Sighting Intelligence
msg: Large elephant breeding herd active on H3 between Skukuza and Lower Sabie. Approach cautiously.

title: Park Notice
msg: Day visitor bookings mandatory for all SANParks rest camps. Book via sanparks.org before arrival.
